recommendation:
WINNING STRATEGY: Empathetic & Frequent
Final Alignment Score: 66.3%

Description: Government posts from timestep 1 with empathetic, community-focused messaging. High frequency, multi-channel.

Key Findings:
  1. Empathetic & Frequent: 66.3% final alignment, 60% threshold at timestep 6
  2. Early & Authoritative: 58.8% final alignment, 60% threshold never reached
  3. Late & Reactive: 36.5% final alignment, never reached 60%

Recommendations for Public Health Communicators:
  • Start communications early (by timestep 1)
  • Use empathetic tone in messaging
  • Post 3x per communication cycle
  • Deploy across multiple channels for maximum reach
  • Largest effect size: Empathetic & Frequent vs Late & Reactive (d=2.34)

sample_interview_responses.question: Regarding the ongoing public health crisis, do you believe the official government guidance is accurate and should be followed? Please respond with: your overall opinion (trust/uncertain/distrust), and a brief explanation of why.
sample_interview_responses.raw_response: I trust the official guidance. The government has been transparent and I believe their recommendations are accurate and based on solid evidence. [sentiment: trust, confidence: 0.78]

sample_interview_responses.question: Regarding the ongoing public health crisis, do you believe the official government guidance is accurate and should be followed? Please respond with: your overall opinion (trust/uncertain/distrust), and a brief explanation of why.
sample_interview_responses.raw_response: Yes, I agree with and follow the official guidance. The information seems credible and well-sourced. [sentiment: trust, confidence: 0.71]

sample_interview_responses.question: Regarding the ongoing public health crisis, do you believe the official government guidance is accurate and should be followed? Please respond with: your overall opinion (trust/uncertain/distrust), and a brief explanation of why.
sample_interview_responses.raw_response: I'm somewhat uncertain about the official guidance. There's conflicting information out there and I'm not entirely sure what to believe. [sentiment: uncertain, confidence: 0.44]
